source_pr.title: domain: fix test 'start syncer failed'
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
This PR tries to close #14427

### What is changed and how it works?
If we disable the failpoint after checking syncer staring, if may fail because:
In https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/a5e06604397969345c0c7dea3bb8097d31825215/domain/domain.go#L485-L509

syncer.Done() will return repeatly.  
Between `do.SchemaValidator.Stop()` and `rr := do.mustRestartSyncer()`, `syncerStarted` is false.
If the environment is CI, the peroid of "syncerStop" will be longer and the tests more likely to fail.



### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->


Code changes

 

Side effects

 - NA

symptoms: PR body says CI makes syncerStop period longer and tests more likely to fail; moves failpoint disabling to avoid a window where syncerStarted is false.
failure_signature: PR body says CI makes syncerStop period longer and tests more likely to fail; moves failpoint disabling to avoid a window where syncerStarted is false.

evidence: evidence: PR body says CI makes syncerStop period longer and tests more likely to fail; moves failpoint disabling to avoid a window where syncerStarted is false.
evidence: diff disables failpoint immediately after <-dom.ddl.SchemaSyncer().Done() instead of after polling syncerStarted (domain/domain_test.go).
